game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: RPG ヴィラン転生 is a pixel-art JRPG where players control a party of villainous characters, navigating a 2D overworld by tapping to move. Combat is turn-based, initiated by encountering enemies, where players tap commands like Attack, Skill, or Item from a menu for each character. The core battle mechanic involves exploiting enemy weaknesses (e.g., elemental, physical) to fill a "Break" gauge; once full, the enemy is stunned, allowing a powerful "Break Attack" for bonus damage. Players earn "Infamy" by performing villainous acts, which functions as experience points to level up characters, unlock skill points for a customizable skill tree, and enable "Class Upgrades." Dungeon exploration yields building materials to expand an evil base with facilities like a Blacksmith and Research Lab, providing gear and skill enhancements, as players progress through a fixed story to its conclusion.
game_info.description: You lead a party of villains seeking to conquer the realm! Navigate the overworld, battle enemies using turn-based combat, and exploit their weaknesses to unleash devastating Break Attacks. Earn Infamy (XP) through villainous acts to level up your party, unlock new skills, and upgrade your characters' classes. Explore dungeons to gather materials for expanding your evil base with facilities that enhance your power. Progress through the story to ultimate victory!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menus, move party in overworld
Space: Confirm selection, interact, advance dialogue
Z: Cancel/Back in menus
Shift: Toggle sprint mode in overworld (faster movement)
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Test basic movement and combat initiation. This validates that the player can navigate the overworld, encounter enemies, and enter combat successfully.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move the party around the overworld in different directions to explore the map. Actively seek out enemy encounters to trigger combat. Test all four directional movements and collision detection with boundaries.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The party should move smoothly across the overworld. Random encounters should trigger combat phase transitions. Movement should be restricted by map boundaries. No crashes or unexpected behavior during navigation.
TEST_1.description: Test basic movement and combat initiation. This validates that the player can navigate the overworld, encounter enemies, and enter combat successfully.

TEST_1.expected: The party should move smoothly across the overworld. Random encounters should trigger combat phase transitions. Movement should be restricted by map boundaries. No crashes or unexpected behavior during navigation.

TEST_2.test_description: Test optimal combat strategy to win the game. This validates the complete game loop including combat mechanics, Break system, leveling, and victory condition.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Engage in combat encounters systematically. Exploit enemy weaknesses to build Break gauge quickly. Use Break Attacks when available for maximum damage. Prioritize healing when health is low. Progress through encounters to reach victory.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully complete multiple combat encounters using the Break mechanic. Gain Infamy and level up characters. Reach the final victory condition (GAME_OVER_WIN) by defeating all required enemies or completing the story objective.
TEST_2.description: Test optimal combat strategy to win the game. This validates the complete game loop including combat mechanics, Break system, leveling, and victory condition.
TEST_2.strategy: Engage in combat encounters systematically. Exploit enemy weaknesses to build Break gauge quickly. Use Break Attacks when available for maximum damage. Prioritize healing when health is low. Progress through encounters to reach victory.
TEST_2.expected: Successfully complete multiple combat encounters using the Break mechanic. Gain Infamy and level up characters. Reach the final victory condition (GAME_OVER_WIN) by defeating all required enemies or completing the story objective.

TEST_3.test_description: Test skill usage and resource management in combat. This validates that skills can be used effectively and that resource management (SP/MP) works correctly.
TEST_3.strategy_description: In combat, use various skills from different party members. Test elemental skills against appropriate enemy weaknesses. Manage skill points carefully to avoid running out. Use basic attacks when low on resources.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Skills should consume appropriate resources and deal correct damage. Elemental weaknesses should increase Break gauge faster. Running out of skill points should force use of basic attacks. All skill animations and effects should display correctly.
TEST_3.description: Test skill usage and resource management in combat. This validates that skills can be used effectively and that resource management (SP/MP) works correctly.

TEST_4.test_description: Test item usage and inventory management. This validates that items can be collected, stored, and used effectively in combat.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Collect items from the overworld and dungeon exploration. Use healing items in combat when party members are injured. Test item effects and confirm inventory updates correctly.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Items should be added to inventory when collected. Using items in combat should apply correct effects (healing, buffs, etc.). Inventory should update properly after item usage. Item count should be accurately tracked.
TEST_4.description: Test item usage and inventory management. This validates that items can be collected, stored, and used effectively in combat.

TEST_4.expected: Items should be added to inventory when collected. Using items in combat should apply correct effects (healing, buffs, etc.). Inventory should update properly after item usage. Item count should be accurately tracked.
